title: Copula tail fixes (Student-t AIC, marginal interpolation) + copula VaR portfolio integration

bugs_found: copula_tail.py: Student-t copula log-likelihood computes bivariate-t joint density instead of copula density (missing marginal t-density subtraction), making AIC incomparable with Clayton/Gumbel/Frank families — biases model selection toward Student-t
copula_tail.py: Empirical marginal transform uses integer floor indexing instead of linear interpolation, losing precision in distribution tails where VaR/CVaR is computed
copula_tail.py: Gumbel log-likelihood has 8 lines of dead code (log_c computed but never used)
stress_testing.py: Oil shock in hypothetical_stress_test only triggers for oil_pct > 0.1, completely ignoring negative oil shocks (drops) for non-energy sectors
observation.gap_identified: Copula-based tail risk (VaR/CVaR) computed separately but never integrated into portfolio analysis endpoint — users see standard Gaussian VaR only

bugs_fixed: Student-t copula: added marginal t log-likelihood subtraction so copula AIC is comparable across families (joint_loglik - marginal_loglik)
Empirical marginal transform: replaced floor(position).astype(int) with linear interpolation between adjacent sorted returns for better tail precision
Removed dead log_c computation in Gumbel copula log-likelihood
Oil shock: changed condition from oil_pct > 0.1 to abs(oil_pct) > 0.1, and use oil_pct * sensitivity (not abs) so sign propagates correctly — falling oil now benefits non-energy
implementation.feature_built: Copula VaR/CVaR integration into portfolio analyze endpoint: new compute_copula_risk_from_returns() function accepts pre-fetched returns (avoids double yfinance fetch), wired into PortfolioEngine.analyze_portfolio() — response now includes copula_risk with gaussian vs t-copula VaR/CVaR comparison and tail_risk_underestimate_pct

limitations: Student-t copula still uses coarse grid search over nu (9 values) rather than continuous optimization
Copula portfolio risk uses fixed nu=5 for t-copula MC simulation rather than fitting nu from data
Integration is server-side only — frontend does not yet display copula_risk fields
assessment.self_critique: The Student-t marginal correction is the highest-impact fix — it was causing systematically wrong copula family selection. The copula VaR integration reuses pre-fetched data efficiently but could be made optional via config flag for performance-sensitive deployments.

next_steps: Frontend: display copula_risk comparison on portfolio analysis page (gaussian vs copula VaR/CVaR)
Fit nu from data in copula portfolio risk MC rather than hardcoding nu=5
Add liquidity-adjusted position sizing using liquidity_risk scores
Integrate insider trading signal as additive weight in signal engine
Wire Google Trends fear/greed into macro risk dashboard
